uq_expense_idem.name: uq_expense_idem
uq_expense_idem.where: idempotency_key IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

fx_by_source.name: fx_by_source
fx_by_source.value: ("expenses"."settlement_amount_source"='converted' AND "expenses"."exchange_rate" IS NOT NULL AND "expenses"."exchange_rate_source" IS NOT NULL) OR ("expenses"."settlement_amount_source"='card_billed' AND "expenses"."exchange_rate_source" IS NULL)

paid_consistency.name: paid_consistency
paid_consistency.value: (payment_status='paid' AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND marked_by_member_id IS NOT NULL) OR (payment_status='pending' AND paid_at IS NULL AND marked_by_member_id IS NULL)
